text:
Rock (石) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

Summary

This is a simple rock. It can be of any quality, material density and size.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.21449 :: 石 
道端にある、何のへんてつもない石。人に向かって投げれば、そこそこのダメージは与えられる。 
|-
![Eng]
|No.21449 :: Rock 
An ordinary rock found anywhere. It could cause some damage if thrown hard enough.
|}
